zh.lifeSummary: 當William M Swafford於1746年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加北卡羅來納州奧拉時，他的父親Thomas Swaffer41歲，母親Catherine Roach Johnson40歲。他於大約1766年與Eleanor Peyton在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加北卡羅來納州蘭多夫結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1830年在美國北卡羅來納州蘭多夫享年84歲，埋葬在美國北卡羅來納州蘭多夫。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William M Swafford于1746年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加北卡罗来纳州奧拉时，他的父亲Thomas Swaffer41岁，母亲Catherine Roach Johnson40岁。他于大约1766年与Eleanor Peyton在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加北卡罗来纳州蘭多夫结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1830年在美国北卡罗来纳州蘭多夫享年84岁，埋葬在美国北卡罗来纳州蘭多夫。

nameMeanings.name: Swafford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: probably a habitational name from a lost or unidentified place. Compare   Swofford  .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Tryon Palace
historicEvents.description: Built on August 26, 1767, the Tryon Palace became the capitol building for North Carolina. The building was named after William Tryon a British officer and colonial official.

historicEvents.title: Edenton Tea Party
historicEvents.description: On October 25, 1774, the Edenton Tea Party took place. It was the first organized women's protest. They put their cups down and refused to buy any tea.
Thomas Jefferson's American Declaration of Independence endorsed by Congress. Colonies declare independence.
George Washington elected first president of United States.

historicEvents.title: Becomes 12th State
historicEvents.description: On November 21, 1789, North Carolina became the 12th state in the Union.
War of 1812. U.S. declares war on Britain over British interference with American maritime shipping and westward expansion.

historicEvents.title: Trail of Tears
historicEvents.description: In the 1830's, President Jackson called for all the Native Americans to be forced off their own land. As the Cherokee were forced out of North Carolina many of them hid in the mountains of North Carolina.
historicEvents.urlTitle: North Carolina Trail of Tears Association

en.lifeSummary: When William M Swafford was born in 1746, in Orange, North Carolina, British Colonial America, his father, Thomas Swaffer, was 41 and his mother, Catherine Roach Johnson, was 40. He married Eleanor Peyton about 1766, in Randolph, North Carolina, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 4 daughters. He died in 1830, in Randolph, North Carolina, United States, at the age of 84, and was buried in Randolph, North Carolina, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William M Swafford est né en 1746, à Orange, Caroline du Nord, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Thomas Swaffer, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Catherine Roach Johnson, avait 40 ans. Il a épousé Eleanor Peyton environ 1766, à Randolph, Caroline du Nord, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1830, à Randolph, Caroline du Nord, États-Unis, à l’âge de 84 ans, et a été enterré à Randolph, Caroline du Nord, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als William M Swafford 1746 in Orange, North Carolina, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Swaffer 41 und seine Mutter Catherine Roach Johnson 40. Er hat um 1766 in Randolph, North Carolina, British Colonial America Eleanor Peyton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1830 im Alter von 84 Jahren in Randolph, North Carolina, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Randolph, North Carolina, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William M Swafford è nato il nel 1746 nel Orange, Carolina del Nord, British Colonial America, il suo padre, Thomas Swaffer, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Catherine Roach Johnson, aveva 40 anni. Lui sposato Eleanor Peyton circa 1766, nel Randolph, Carolina del Nord, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1830, nel Randolph, Carolina del Nord, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 84 anni, e fu sepolto a Randolph, Carolina del Nord, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: William M Swaffordが1746年にイギリス植民地アメリカノースカロライナ州オランッジで生まれた時，父Thomas Swafferは41歳，母Catherine Roach Johnsonは40歳であった。約1766年にイギリス植民地アメリカノースカロライナ州ランドルフでEleanor Peytonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1830年にアメリカ合衆国ノースカロライナ州ランドルフで84歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国ノースカロライナ州ランドルフにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William M Swafford(이)가 1746년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 노스캐롤라이나 주 오랑에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Swaffer(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Catherine Roach Johnson(은)는 40세였다. 그는 대략 1766년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 노스캐롤라이나 주 랜돌프에서 Eleanor Peyton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1830년 미국 노스캐롤라이나 주 랜돌프에서 84세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 노스캐롤라이나 주 랜돌프에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William M Swafford nasceu em 1746, em Orange, Carolina do Norte, British Colonial America, seu pai, Thomas Swaffer, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Catherine Roach Johnson, tinha 40 anos. Ele casou-se com Eleanor Peyton aproximadamente 1766, em Randolph, Carolina do Norte, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1830, em Randolph, Carolina do Norte, Estados Unidos da América, com 84 anos, e foi sepultado em Randolph, Carolina do Norte, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William M Swafford родился в 1746 г. в местности оранг, Северная Каролина, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени Thomas Swaffer было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Catherine Roach Johnson, 40. Он женился на женщине по имени Eleanor Peyton около 1766 г. в местности рандолф, Северная Каролина, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1830 г. в местности рандолф, Северная Каролина, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 84 лет и был похоронен в местности рандолф, Северная Каролина, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William M Swafford nació en 1746, en Orange, Carolina del Norte, British Colonial America, su papá, Thomas Swaffer, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Catherine Roach Johnson, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Eleanor Peyton aproximadamente 1766, en Randolph, Carolina del Norte, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1830, en Randolph, Carolina del Norte, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 84 años, y fue sepultado en Randolph, Carolina del Norte, Estados Unidos.
